description: U.S. Gold Bureau is a precious-metals dealer. The usgb.io domain appears to host an MCP endpoint related to metal spot pricing.
summary: usgb.io exposes a public MCP server for U.S. Gold Bureau metal spot data at https://spot-mcp.usgb.io/api/mcp; no other public developer integration surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: U.S. Gold Bureau Metal Spots MCP
